title: FM Forge — 4-Op FM Synthesizer
description: A DX7-style 4-operator FM synth with 6 algorithms, full ADSR per operator, a playable keyboard, and one-click WAV recording.
concept: FM Forge lets you route four sine/wave operators through six classic FM algorithms — chains, stacks, dual pairs, and pure additive — each with independent ratio, detune, level, and ADSR. Play it live from an on-screen piano or your computer keyboard, browse six factory presets (E.Piano, Glass Bell, Sub Growl Bass, Warm Pad, Pluck Bass, Brass Stab), save your own patches to localStorage, and record any performance straight to a downloadable WAV file.
features: 6 selectable FM algorithms (chain, stack, dual-pair, additive) with live routing diagram
4 fully-parametrized operators: waveform, ratio, detune, level, and per-operator ADSR
Playable virtual piano (mouse/touch, up to 8-voice polyphony) plus full QWERTY keyboard mapping
6 factory presets + save/delete custom presets, persisted to localStorage
Live oscilloscope visualizer of the master output
One-click recording rendered to a real 16-bit PCM WAV download

interaction.mouse: Click/drag operator sliders to shape sound; click piano keys to play notes
interaction.click: Click Record to arm capture, click again to stop and reveal the WAV download link
interaction.touch: Tap piano keys to play; sliders are touch-draggable; layout reflows to 2 columns on phones
interaction.keyboard: Z-M and Q-P play notes across the current octave; Octave buttons shift range
